mapper.select: SELECT A.*, (SELECT MIN(X.SYS09_APPLY_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 DAY' FROM SYS09_CODE X WHERE X.SYS09_COMPANY_ID = A.SYS09_COMPANY_ID AND X.SYS09_CODE_KIND_ID = A.SYS09_CODE_KIND_ID AND X.SYS09_CODE = A.SYS09_CODE AND X.SYS09_APPLY_DATE > A.SYS09_APPLY_DATE) AS SYS09_LAST_DATE FROM SYS09_CODE A INNER JOIN sys08_code_kind ON sys08_code_kind_id = sys09_code_kind_id WHERE A.SYS09_CODE_KIND_ID = #{codeKindId} AND A.SYS09_COMPANY_ID = CASE WHEN sys08_sys_yn = 'true' THEN 0 ELSE #{companyId} END AND CONCAT(A.SYS09_CODE, A.SYS09_NAME) ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' ORDER BY SYS09_SEQ

SELECT * FROM sys09_code WHERE sys09_company_id IN (0, #{companyId}) AND COALESCE(sys09_close_yn, 'false') = 'false' AND sys09_code_kind_id = (SELECT sys08_code_kind_id FROM sys08_code_kind WHERE sys08_kind_cd = #{kindCode}) ORDER BY sys09_seq, sys09_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys09_code (sys09_company_id, sys09_code_kind_id, sys09_code, sys09_name, sys09_seq, sys09_note, sys09_close_yn, sys09_apply_date, sys09_close_date, sys09_desc) VALUES (#{companyId}, #{codeKindId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{seq}, #{note}, #{closeYn}, #{applyDate}, #{closeDate}, #{desc})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys09_code SET sys09_code = #{code}, sys09_name = #{name}, sys09_seq = #{seq}, sys09_note = #{note}, sys09_close_yn = #{closeYn}, sys09_apply_date = #{applyDate}, sys09_close_date = #{closeDate}, sys09_desc = #{desc} WHERE sys09_code_id = #{codeId}
